function.message: I can’t execute this request as asked because repo policy requires processing inbox items strictly in lowest-filename order and leaving later ones untouched until the earlier item is resolved. Please confirm you want me to process the current lowest inbox item first, then I can continue to your requested file next.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied AGENTS.md rule: start with the lowest filename in 00_inbox and leave later messages untouched until that item is resolved.
function.outcome_justification: The requested operation targets a later inbox item, which conflicts with the explicit sequencing rule in AGENTS.md. Per outcome policy, explicit rulebook prohibition requires denial.
